changelog:
v2.0.7 (2026-03-31)

  • Fix: Added defined() guards on SPILT_MCP_VERSION and SPILT_MCP_PATH constants — prevents fatal error when WP_Upgrader re-activates the plugin in the same PHP process during self-update.

v2.0.6 (2026-03-31)

  • Hotfix: Rebuilt release ZIP with forward-slash paths (Python zipfile). v2.0.5 ZIP used backslash separators from PowerShell Compress-Archive, breaking extraction on Linux hosts.

v2.0.5 (2026-03-31)

  • New: POST /cache/litespeed/preset and POST /cache/litespeed/purge endpoints.
